untranslatable_reason: Signal requires implied volatility vs theoretical value comparison, ratio spread construction logic, and net edge calculation. These require options pricing models (Black-Scholes inputs: strike, expiration, interest rate, dividend) and multi-leg position management not available in the allowed indicator set. The 'implied volatility is perceived to be too high' and 'net theoretical edge is positive' conditions cannot be translated to price/technical indicators without options pricing calculations.
translation_notes: Attempted to proxy volatility conditions using india_vix and hvol_20 as imperfect substitutes for implied volatility assessment, but the core logic of ratio vertical call spreads with theoretical edge calculation is fundamentally incompatible with technical indicator-only rules. This is an options strategy requiring derivatives pricing framework.
